name: Workforce-Time

tenantConfigKeys.workforce.slug: stable tenant slug used in auth_users.tenant_slug
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.tenant.allowed_hosts: hostnames accepted by the login layer
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.paths.db_dir: SQLite directory relative to tenant root
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.paths.imports_dir: snapshot import directory relative to tenant root
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.paths.seed_file: initial seed file relative to tenant root
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.auth.public_base_url: absolute URL used in magic links
tenantConfigKeys.workforce.auth.smtp: SMTP config; password only via password_env

secrets: SMTP password env named by workforce.auth.smtp.password_env
notes: Tenant SQLite databases, imports and backups must stay outside Cortex-Web git.
Live legacy-import credentials are intentionally not part of this manifest.
A future cortex add workforce-time command can consume this manifest directly.
